jobs.title: Millennium Internship FAQs
jobs.description: Can I apply to and be considered for more than one role (e.g., engineering and quantitative roles)? We encourage candidates to carefully select and apply to the roles and locations that best align with their skills and aspirations. Please note that individuals may only submit up to two (2) applications, including applications for different locations. What is the ideal time to apply? Our applications will open on August 1st and roles will be filled on a rolling basis. It is best to apply as early

jobs.title: Is experience in financial markets needed to apply to an internship role?
jobs.description: We do not require specific industry experience. In the interview process, we will assess for your areas of interest, applicable skillsets, and potential. Should you be selected for an internship, we provide in-depth training on financial markets.

jobs.title: What does the summer internship look like?
jobs.description: Throughout your internship, you can expect to partake in professional development trainings, financial markets training, networking events, and hear from many senior leaders within the firm. This is all in addition to learning on the desk through meaningful project work side-by-side with your team. We will also have several fun and exciting social events which will allow you to meet others around the firm, connect with your fellow interns, and explore your internship city.

jobs.title: How likely is it to receive a return offer following the internship?
jobs.description: There are many factors that go into the return offer decision. It is our goal to hire our analyst class from our internship program.

This session is being led by a former Two Sigma intern, so I’m interested to hear about her perspective as well as her career trajectory.
